items.label: Johto-only challenge: team ≤ Lv 46
items.note: For 'Shock to the System' — defeat Lt. Surge in Set battle style, using only Johto Pokémon that never exceed Lv 46 in battle, and without using any Pack items.

items.label: Recommended counter
items.note: The cap is higher than the League's, so reuse your League team — especially Piloswine. Low difficulty, unlikely to give trouble.
